svg.title: Current architecture: gnn13 bipartite GNN
svg.desc: Shows how the current gnn13_clip_bipartite model works: a single pooled CLIP embedding and VLM logits feed into a bipartite GNN with 7 attribute nodes and 1 object node, producing 14 CheXpert label predictions.
svg.text: pooled CLIP loses spatial information — cannot produce per-finding attention maps
